description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized human figure, seated with knees drawn up and arms wrapped around the legs. The figure has a prominent, rounded head with closed eyes and a serene facial expression, suggesting a contemplative or meditative pose. The body is simplified with exaggerated curves, and the hands rest gently on the knees. The sculpture is mounted on a square, gray plinth with a circular base between the figure and the plinth, possibly mimicking stone or concrete. The surface of the figure appears matte and slightly rough, with visible sculpting marks. The overall color is a pale, off-white, contrasting with the darker base.
description: A stylized, seated human figure with closed eyes and arms wrapped around its knees, mounted on a square gray plinth. The sculpture has a matte, off-white finish and a contemplative expression.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the back of the head, shoulders, and the curve of the back, with the left arm and leg visible.
description_view_1: Direct rear view highlighting the back, shoulders, and both arms wrapped around the legs, with the plinth's back side visible.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the profile of the face, chest, and the bent legs, with the left arm and hand resting on the knee.
description_view_3: Frontal view showing the serene face, closed eyes, chest, and both arms embracing the knees, with the plinth's front visible.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is shown on a plain background with no visible environmental context.
